scripts.esbuild: mkdir --parents ../../../dist/demo/ && touch ../../../dist/demo.wasm && esbuild --asset-names=[name] --bundle --entry-names=[name] --format=esm --loader:.html=copy --loader:.wasm=copy --log-level=warning --outdir=../../../dist/demo/ --sourcemap=linked --tsconfig=tsconfig.json index.ts index.css index.html ../../../dist/demo.wasm
